title: Vesak — Buddha Day
description: Birth, enlightenment, and parinirvana of the Buddha. Major global observance. (Gregorian 2028)

title: Vesak (alternate date)
description: Some countries observe Vesak on this date when lunar calendar differs. (Gregorian 2028)

title: Buddha Day — Full Moon
description: Full-moon Uposatha aligned with Vesak season in several traditions. (Gregorian 2028)
